events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need identify component/condition and defect cues. Scenario: structural bolting, turn-of-nut match marks absent or not rotated. Work rough-complete. Component condition installed-defective. Decision fail because non-compliant. Risk high? Structural bolting missing turn-of-nut match marks means bolts not tensioned/verified per RCSC. Could be critical because structural connection integrity. But maybe high. Need decide. Since non-compliant and structural safety, risk high or critical. Let's set high. Percent complete rough-complete maybe 90. Confidence 0.95. Findings: match marks absent or not rotated; bolts not tensioned/verified per turn-of-nut method; non-compliant with RCSC. Actions: remove/re-tension bolts using turn-of-nut method, apply match marks, inspection/re-test, document. References: RCSC Specification for Structural Joints Using High-Strength Bolts (turn-of-nut method). Need include component_conditions installed-defective and non-compliant. Work_stage rough-complete. value 0. sound_source etc default. order empty. workable empty. Need valid JSON.
